steps.title: Find the linear rate
steps.content: From 1995 to 2015 (20 years), the population goes from 55 to 217 thousand. The slope is $$m=\frac{217-55}{2015-1995}=\frac{162}{20}=8.1 \text{ thousand/year}.$$

steps.title: Predict the requested value
steps.content: From 2015 to 2019 is 4 years, so add $8.1\cdot 4=32.4$ thousand to the 2015 value: $$x=217+32.4=249.4 \approx 249.$$ The answer is 249.
